summary: Iteration 10: Backend regression tests (9/9 passed) + static code analysis verifying all 4 user-reported bug fixes. All changes verified correctly implemented.

frontend_issues.note: React Native Expo app - frontend verified via static code analysis only (tunnel deployment)

critical_code_review_comments: player.tsx: VERIFIED - showGuide/guideOverlay/guideOpacity states REMOVED. Only bottom overlay remains (lines 330-389). Top TV guide overlay successfully removed.
player.tsx: VERIFIED - Grid icon (grid-outline) at line 385 triggers navigation to /multiview (lines 369-384) with stream params. Multiview navigation working.

multiview.tsx: VERIFIED - New screen with correct 2x2 grid structure (cellW/cellH = dimension/2 at lines 129-130). Uses VideoView from expo-video (line 275). Category picker modal present (lines 159-222). Audio routing via volume control (isActive ? 1 : 0 at lines 237, 246).
tabs/_layout.tsx: VERIFIED - Portrait lock useEffect at lines 14-18 calls ScreenOrientation.lockAsync(PORTRAIT_UP) on mount. Home screen will NOT rotate to landscape.

live.tsx: VERIFIED - Orientation unlock/lock logic at lines 235-291: unlockAsync when activeChannel set (line 245), lockAsync(PORTRAIT_UP) when activeChannel cleared (line 241). Landscape rotation with active channel triggers goFullscreen (lines 250-257).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (4/4 code changes verified via static analysis)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 user-reported issues FIXED: 1) Top guide overlay removed from player.tsx - no showGuide/guideOverlay/guideOpacity found. 2) Grid icon in player navigates to /multiview screen which has 2x2 VideoView grid with volume-based audio routing (active slot volume=1, others=0). 3) tabs/_layout.tsx locks all tab screens to PORTRAIT_UP on mount. 4) live.tsx unlocks orientation when activeChannel is set (allowing rotation), locks PORTRAIT_UP when cleared. Backend APIs all working: /api/health, /api/live/categories, /api/live/streams, /api/stream/url, /api/epg/{stream_id}, /api/user/favorites (POST toggle, GET list).

verified_features.feature: Remove duplicate top TV guide overlay in fullscreen player
verified_features.evidence: grep for showGuide/guideOverlay/guideOpacity in player.tsx returns 'NOT FOUND'

verified_features.feature: Grid icon in player opens multiview
verified_features.evidence: player.tsx line 369-385: player-multiview-btn with grid-outline icon, router.push to /multiview

verified_features.feature: Multiview 2x2 grid with category picker and audio routing
verified_features.evidence: multiview.tsx: VideoView (line 275), 2x2 grid (lines 129-130), Modal picker (lines 159-222), volume isActive?1:0 (lines 237,246)

verified_features.feature: Live screen landscape rotation triggers fullscreen player
verified_features.evidence: live.tsx lines 245-257: unlockAsync when activeChannel, addOrientationChangeListener triggers goFullscreen on LANDSCAPE

verified_endpoints.notes: Returns categories array with category_id, category_name
Returns streams array with stream_id, name
